title: COBBLEPOKEMON
description: A Cobblemon modpack created based on the Pokémon game, anime, and manga. This modpack is updated regularly and includes quite a lot of mods =)
body:
[COBBLEPOKEMON modpack Discord server](https://discord.gg/4drXry5g8N)

-A Cobblemon modpack closely based on the Pokémon games, anime, and manga, featuring Cobblemon mods, resource packs, and datapacks that make your Cobblemon world more vibrant and immersive.

-My modpack also includes structures for summoning Legendary and Mythical Pokémon, as well as various structures and Gyms for you to explore.

-This modpack runs on Minecraft 1.21.1 with the latest Fabric Loader version.

**How to use**

**_To play the modpack, you need to launch the game first. After that, exit the game and navigate to your Minecraft game folder. Look for the global_packs folder; copy all files from the datapacks folder into required_data, and all files from the resourcepacks folder into required_resources. Once you restart Minecraft, you'll be able to enjoy a unique and immersive Cobblemon world that stays true to the original Pokemon games. Have fun gaming!_**

**CREDIT**

-Resource pack PigeonPack by El-Pigeon

Source: https://modrinth.com/datapack/pigeons-poke-pack

-Resource Pack Credits:Cobblemon Z-A Nurses by N8creates

-Original pack:https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-z-a-nurses

All rights belong to the original author.
